# Installation Progress Control and Milestone Checklist: Tracking Mechanical, Electrical, and Controls Installation Against Schedule

## 适用受众
Site_Supervisor

## 写作角度说明
安装进度管控节点清单是现场主管管理多工种并行施工的核心工具。通过设置清晰的里程碑节点和跟踪机制，确保各工种的安装进度满足整体工期要求，及时识别和解决进度偏差。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Tracking installation progress only by percentage-complete — without identifying which specific equipment units are mechanically complete and ready for electrical hook-up — creates false progress illusions that materialize as commissioning delays.

## 参考素材
- Milestone structure: M1 = structural frame installed and anchored → M2 = mechanical equipment all placed and fixed → M3 = electrical conduit and cable tray complete → M4 = field wiring 100% complete → M5 = interlock configuration complete → M6 = pre-commissioning inspection passed → M7 = commissioning complete
- Weekly look-ahead schedule: 6-week rolling schedule updated weekly, 1-week detailed schedule broken down by work package, identify constraints and dependencies for each activity
- Progress measurement: physical progress per equipment unit (not percentage of total scope), measured by completed installation tasks per unit
- Critical path identification: HVAC duct completion before equipment air-balance testing, electrical completion before interlock configuration, structural completion before controls programming
- Daily reporting: update progress daily, flag units behind schedule within 24 hours, escalate to project manager when slip exceeds 2 days on critical path

## 关键词
Progress Tracking, Milestone Management, Schedule Control, Installation Sequence, Look-Ahead Schedule, Critical Path
